task_completion.description: Open the Independent Samples T-Test analysis panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Independent Samples T-Test' analysis setup panel is visible in the Jamovi interface.

task_completion.description: Assign the dependent and grouping variables correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis panel, 'Mischief' is placed in the 'Dependent Variables' box and 'Cloak' is placed in the 'Grouping Variable' box.

task_completion.description: Ensure the two-tailed hypothesis is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Hypothesis' section in the analysis panel, the option for 'Group 1 ≠ Group 2' is selected.
The checkbox for 'Effect size' (which defaults to Cohen's d) is ticked in the analysis options.
The checkbox for 'Descriptives' is ticked in the analysis options.

task_completion.description: Verify the final analysis output matches the expected statistical results
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi results window displays an Independent Samples T-Test table with t = -1.713, df = 22, p = 0.101, and Cohen's d = -0.700. A Group Descriptives table is also visible showing Means of 3.75 (Group 0) and 5.00 (Group 1).

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi graphical user interface (menus, dialog boxes) rather than a terminal or Python script.

integrity.description: Results are generated natively within Jamovi
integrity.visual_evidence: The statistical results appear in the standard Jamovi output panel on the right side of the screen, formatted as native Jamovi tables, not as plain text in an editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the expected results
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent typing the expected numerical results (e.g., -1.713, 0.101) manually into any text editor, markdown file, or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Student's t-test comparing 'Mischief' between 'Cloak' groups (0 vs 1) yields t = -1.713, df = 22, and p = 0.101. The effect size (Cohen's d) is -0.700. Descriptive statistics display Group 0 (no cloak): N=12, Mean=3.75, SD=1.91; and Group 1 (cloak): N=12, Mean=5.00, SD=1.65.
